div1.entryFree: Daubery, colouring, false pretences: we are simple men; we do not know what's brought to pass under the profession of fortune-telling; she works by charms, by spells, by the figure, and such d. as this is, beyond our element: we know nothing, Wiv. IV, 2, 186 (i. e. in fact she is a go-between).
